# Herin Yudha Pratama

> AI automation builder & commercial systems operator in Bandung, Indonesia. Fourteen years across founder, marketing manager, commercial lead, and head-of-commercial roles — now using AI-assisted development, coding agents, APIs, and orchestration to turn commerce workflows into practical apps, dashboards, WhatsApp systems, and optimization loops.

herin.id is his personal site: profile, live product demos, and ways to work together.

## About

- Herin is not positioning as a traditional developer or full-stack engineer. His edge is commercial/operator context plus AI-assisted build workflow.
- Fourteen years across commerce and consumer brands: founded MAJI and AS GOOD SUPPLY CO, then led and grew commercial operations across Paddy Indonesia, PORTEE, and Visval.
- Performance marketing is home ground: over a million dollars managed across Meta, Google, TikTok, and Shopee ads at a 15–20× average ROAS.
- Today he turns real business workflows into practical systems: ERP-style internal tools, WhatsApp commerce dashboards, reporting, AI agents, and workflow orchestration.

## Services

- AI Automation & Agent Orchestration: AI workflows and agent orchestration for research, reporting, operations, support, and decision loops — with human checkpoints and practical monitoring.
- AI-Assisted App Prototyping: internal apps, dashboards, and workflow tools shipped with AI-assisted development — scoped around real business flows, then tested in production.
- ERP & Accounting Systems: ERP-style workflows mapped from real operations: sales, purchasing, inventory, ledger, reporting, and operator dashboards.
- WhatsApp Commerce & AI Chatbots: selling and serving customers where they already are — with agents that know their limits.
- Performance Marketing & Ads: Meta, Google, TikTok, and Shopee ads — over a million dollars managed at a 15–20× average ROAS.
- Dashboards & Analytics: numbers from many sources, unified and presented so they're fast to read — and right.

## Experience

- Founder — MAJI (2023–now, Bandung): built and operated a consumer fragrance brand across product, content, marketplace, paid acquisition, and customer operations.
- Head of Commercial — Paddy Indonesia (2024–2026, Bandung): led commercial operations across offline stores, online store, marketplaces, CRM, KOL, content, and performance marketing.
- Marketing Manager — PORTEE (2023–2024, Bandung): managed growth across performance marketing, marketplace campaigns, CRM, KOL coordination, and digital acquisition.
- Commercial Lead & Digital Marketing Manager — Visval (2021–2022, Bandung): led online store, marketplace growth, performance marketing, CRM, and KOL strategy.
- Founder — AS GOOD SUPPLY CO (2012–2021, Bandung): founded and operated an independent apparel/supply brand for nearly a decade, covering product, sales, operations, and community-led growth.

## Live demos

- [ERP & Accounting demo](https://herin.id/#erp): live ERP-style operations demo with safe dummy data — sales, purchasing, and inventory flowing into stock movement and accounting records: journal posting, AR/AP, cash and bank, general ledger, P&L, and management dashboards. Direct: https://erp.herin.id
- [WhatsApp Commerce demo](https://herin.id/#wa): unified WhatsApp inbox with customer context and AI-to-human handoff, broadcasts (restock alerts, cart recovery, VIP drops, segmentation, scheduling), and commerce analytics.

Both demos are real software running in production infrastructure, isolated with safe dummy data.
